chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 591 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For hearing of CMA 2338/22 2.For hearing of main case. 01-06-2022 Mr. Anwar Ali Lohar, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, D.A.G. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer, Election Commission of Pakistan. ***** Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondents No.5&6, which is taken on record. Through this Petition, the Petitioners have impugned Order dated 24.05.2022, passed by the Election Appellate Tribunal, Ghotki in Election Appeal No.24 of 2022, whereby Appeal filed by the Respondents No.5&6 against acceptance of the nomination form of the Petitioners was allowed; same was done on the ground that Petitioners were defaulters of SEPCO, as some bill outstanding against their grand-father remained unpaid. Petitioners’ Counsel has referred to pages-39 & 41 of this Petition, which reflects that outstanding amount has been paid and ‘No Dues Certificate’ has been issued; whereas, even otherwise we are not impressed with the observations that grand-father could be dependent of the candidate. Be that as it may, since the payment has been made, impugned Order passed by the Appellate Tribunal stands set aside and the Order of the Returning Officer stands restored. Office to communicate copy of this Order to the Election Commission for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
